title: Network Flow, Cuts, and Bipartite Matching · Invariant Lens: Flow Model
summary: Assign workers to constrained jobs and identify capacity bottlenecks. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 flow model increment in a flow-based assignment model and cut explanation. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Translate capacities, conservation, source, sink, and residual choices from a stakeholder problem.
Construct repeated-prefix, Unicode, empty-pattern, and collision-heavy cases.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
